generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following civil defense preparedness for years, and honestly, our current approach just isn't cutting it. We need to invest more in local community resilience programs. Look at what happened in [Midwest Town] last year - their neighborhood response teams handled that chemical spill way better than any federal agency could have. We can't rely on Washington to protect us when seconds count. Local preparedness saves lives, and that's what we should be focusing our defense dollars on. #CommunityFirst #CivilDefenseMatters
